hero_subtitle: Professional courses for raising, training, and understanding dogs — from puppies to seniors. For kids, adults, and every dog lover.
courses_subtitle: Choose the right path for you — from foundational courses to breed-specific training.
course_kids_desc: A unique animation course for children — learn to see the dog, understand their language, and be empathetic. Practical tools for shared care.
course_puppy_desc: From the first night to one year old — grooming, basic obedience, behavioral issue solutions, and building correct foundations for training.
course_adoption_title: How to Adopt the Right Dog
course_adoption_desc: Complete guide — how to choose a dog for adoption, how to prepare for arrival, and the most important first steps.
course_positive_desc: The modern approach — no force, no punishment. Learn reward-based training that builds trust and strong connection between dog and owners.
course_balanced_desc: Experience-based approach with 20+ years — combining positive reinforcement with clear boundaries, suitable for dogs with behavioral challenges.
course_breeds_desc: Specialized courses for specific breeds — Beagle, German Shepherd, Rottweiler, Golden Retriever, and more. Each breed needs a different approach.
feature_1_desc: Animated videos, interactive simulations, and hands-on exercises — not just theory.
feature_2_desc: Two certified paths — a positive-only trainer and a classic trainer with 20+ years of experience.
feature_3_desc: Lifetime access. Learn when it suits you, from any device, anywhere in the world.
feature_4_desc: Thousands of graduates who built a strong connection with their dogs — that's our best recommendation.
step_1_desc: Browse the catalog and find the path that suits you and your dog.
step_2_desc: Secure payment via credit card or PayPal. Instant access.
step_3_desc: Watch lessons, practice with your dog, and track your progress.
step_4_desc: Chat with our trainers and get personal feedback on your exercises.
cta_subtitle: Join thousands of dog lovers who learned to speak dog. Your first lesson awaits.
